headline: 7 things to know about Schwab's new brokerage account for teenagers
summary: The new Teen Investor Account from Charles Schwab gives teens and parents the opportunity to start investing. Here's what to know.

headline: What Makes The Charles Schwab Corporation (SCHW) a Leader in Wealth Management Growth?
summary: Ruane, Cunniff LP, an investment adviser managing Sequoia Strategy, released its Q4 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Sequoia Strategy returned 9% in Q4 compared to 2.7% for the S&P 500 Index. The Strategy delivered a return of 21.9% in 2025 versus 17.9% for the Index. In a year […]

headline: Big Tech Stocks Rout Is Flashing Signals of a Turnaround
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The wreckage in large technology stocks that sent the Nasdaq 100 Index into a correction is flashing signs that have marked turning points for the group in the past.Chief among the signals is how much of Big Tech’s valuation premium to the rest of the market has been erased. Such a compression has historically set the sector up for outperformance.After an 11% slide from its last record in October, the tech-focused gauge now trades at 21 times projected 12-month earnings, just 1.7
